/usr/local/arm/gcc-linaro-4.9.4-2017.01-x86_64_arm-linux-gnueabihf/bin/arm-linux-gnueabihf-g++ CMakeFiles/gateway_app.dir/src/gateway_app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway_app.dir/src/video_capture.c.o CMakeFiles/gateway_app.dir/src/frame_sender.c.o CMakeFiles/gateway_app.dir/src/gpio_ops.c.o CMakeFiles/gateway_app.dir/src/tlv_protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/gateway_app.dir/src/mes_handler.c.o -o gateway_app  -lpthread
